notes: ATO 2023-24 Corporate Report of Entity Tax Information workbook for tax fields. Net profit copied from Viva Energy Group Limited Annual Report 2025, consolidated results and statement of profit or loss; ATO tax year and annual-report period do not match exactly.

fields.net_profit_basis: statutory net loss after tax on a historical cost basis
fields.prrt_note: Viva Energy is a downstream refiner and retailer; not within the PRRT regime which applies only to upstream petroleum project profits.
fields.prrt_source: ATO 2023-24 Corporate Report of Entity Tax Information, PRRT details sheet
